message.content:
@startuml
title Temperature Sensor A internal sequence

hide footbox
skinparam backgroundColor #D9D9D9
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #D9D9D9
  ParticipantBorderColor #6B6B6B
  ParticipantFontColor #000000
  ParticipantFontSize 22
  ParticipantPadding 25
  BoxBorderColor #6B6B6B
  BoxBackgroundColor #D9D9D9
  LifeLineBorderColor #6B6B6B
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #D9D9D9
  ActivationBorderColor #000000
  ActivationBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ArrowColor #000000
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageAlign left
}

participant "Internal Sequence" as IS
participant "getSignal" as GS
participant "AD conversion" as AD
participant "signal processing" as SP

IS -> GS : start
activate GS

GS -> AD
activate AD

AD -> SP
activate SP
SP --> AD
deactivate SP

AD --> GS
deactivate AD

GS --> IS : end
deactivate GS

@enduml
